description: Bill of divorce (geṭ). Husband: Ṣedaqa b. Ḥalfon. Wife: Sumr bt. Yosef. Location: Fustat. Signed by Mevorakh b. Natan he-Ḥaver and Levi ha-Levi b. Abraham. Dated: 28 Tishrei 1492 Seleucid, which is 1180 CE. On verso the certification that Sumr received the geṭ.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בCUL & Bodl..
